summary: Completed comprehensive testing of trading bot state persistence fix and active trading verification. Backend: All engine state persistence working correctly - bot state (running/paused/simulate_24_7) persists in MongoDB under 'engine_state' key. API health shows running=true, paused=false, market_open=true. Verified actual executed trades for AAPL, TSLA, QBTS with proper P&L calculations. Frontend: All dashboard features functional - Stop Bot button visible (confirming engine running), AAPL card shows Take Profit button (P&L +$0.34), Live Activity sidebar displays recent trades, Positions tab shows open positions correctly.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection to '/api/ws' fails but app functions normally with HTTP fallback
integration_issues.note: Application remains fully functional using REST API calls

design_issues.issue: React warning about duplicate keys in AnimatePresence component
design_issues.note: Non-functional issue - UI displays correctly despite warning

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/health shows running=true, paused=false, market_open=true (simulate_24_7 enabled)
Backend GET /api/trades returns 50 actual executed trades for AAPL, TSLA, QBTS
Backend POST /api/bot/start persists state correctly - verified through health endpoint
Backend POST /api/bot/stop persists state correctly - verified through health endpoint
Backend Engine state restoration confirmed - MongoDB 'engine_state' key working
Backend AAPL dollar mode trading: buy=$250.00, sell=$250.10 bracket orders executing
Frontend Dashboard shows 'Stop Bot' button confirming engine is running
Frontend AAPL card displays Take Profit button with P&L +$0.34 (positive profit)
Frontend QBTS card shows Take Profit button available
Frontend Live Activity sidebar shows recent trade entries (7 buy, 19 sell indicators)
Frontend Positions tab displays open positions correctly - AAPL: 2.0010 @ $260.80
Frontend Status indicators show 'Connected' and 'Market Open' correctly
Frontend Total P&L header shows +$0.22, Active positions 3/4, Cash Reserve $4.10

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor WebSocket connectivity issue, core functionality perfect)
